name: triggers-mcp
label: Triggers
description: Webhook trigger creation and management. Lets agents configure event-driven webhooks (per-user or per-agent) that fire tasks and/or notifications when external systems (GitHub, Stripe, Linear, IoT, etc.) call the platform.

skills.description: When and how to use triggers, scope rules, the trigger ↔ task and trigger ↔ notification pairing patterns, webhook setup workflow
